positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a cosmic sloth relaxing on a crescent moon. The sloth has gentle, deep blue fur and is surrounded by floating elements: stylized constellations forming zodiac signs, nebula dust in soft lavender and teal tones, and small, glowing planets. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, with clean, thick outlines reminiscent of mid-century modern design. Use strong silhouettes and minimal detail for high print contrast. The overall color palette is deep space blues, luminous magentas, and gentle cream accents. Suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: ugly, tiling, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, blurry, text, logo, watermark, signature, artifact, noisy, muted colors
